---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12.0, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 16.14.0]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 98, Firefox 97, Safari 15]
- Application version: [e.g. v1.2.3]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Bug Report Guidelines
Thank you for reporting a bug! Please ensure:
- The issue has not been previously reported
- You have provided clear steps to reproduce
- You have included relevant environment information
- You have checked if this is a configuration issue on your end

We will review your bug report and respond as soon as possible.
